name: wipe
title: wipe
description: A hard-edged wipe between two scenes — incoming scene reveals from one edge to the opposite as a moving boundary. Onda's directional vocabulary (`left` / `right` / `up` / `down`); diagonals deliberately excluded. Wraps Remotion's `wipe()`.
pickWhen: the cut needs to read as deliberate — segment break, news/sports register. Use `glass-wipe` for textured; `dip-to-color` for editorial.
